hero.title: Mission-Critical Embedded Computing & Industrial olutions
hero.description: Over 30 years of expertise delivering embedded computing, industrial PCs, and safety-critical systems for defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial applications.

solutions.title: 주요 솔루션
solutions.description: Backed by our in-house R&D center and decades of domain expertise, AceTec delivers tailored technology solutions for defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial automation — all KC certified and ISO 9001 compliant.

items.title: 임베디드 컴퓨팅
items.description: Board-level signal processing systems — including Jade, Cobalt, Onyx, Talon, Flexor, and Spark platforms — engineered for demanding defense and aerospace environments.

items.title: Industrial & Networking
items.description: KC certified, ISO 9001 compliant fanless PCs, rackmount servers, and network appliances built for continuous 24/7 operation in demanding industrial environments.

items.title: Safety-Critical Systems
items.description: TÜV SÜD SIL4 certified HIMA ControlSafe™ platforms for railway signaling and train control — fail-safe, fault-tolerant architecture ensuring the highest level of operational safety.

items.title: Telecom & Networking
items.description: Intel/AMD-based network appliances for firewall, VPN, UTM, and load balancing — paired with high-performance NICs for data center and telecom infrastructure.

items.title: Sensor Modeling & Simulation
items.description: OKTAL-SE high-fidelity EO/IR/RF sensor simulation for Hardware-In-the-Loop, Man-In-the-Loop, and training simulation environments.

items.title: 슈퍼컴퓨팅 시스템
items.description: As Big Data, UHD/FHD, and Simulation demands grow, HPC requirements are increasing across government, academia, and research labs. High Density Compute Accelerators deliver differentiated HPC through GPU-based processing.

items.title: 산업용 컴퓨터
items.description: Comprehensive technology solutions from government workstations to special-purpose computing, defense systems, industrial HMI, and semiconductor quality inspection equipment.

items.title: 레이더
items.description: End-to-end radar data processing — from signal generation and acquisition to precision analysis, target tracking, multi-channel recording, and integrated situational visualization.

items.title: High-Speed Data Interconnect
items.description: Build ultra-fast computing clusters using proprietary PCIe-based communication protocols that minimize data transfer latency between servers, GPUs, and storage, operating multiple nodes as a single unified system.

consult.title: Need a customized solution?
consult.description: Our engineers provide end-to-end consulting — from platform selection and system design to deployment and ongoing support — for your mission-critical applications.

servicePlan.title: 토탈 서비스 솔루션
servicePlan.subtitle: We support every stage of your project — from initial system consulting through to final delivery.

steps.title: Consulting & Design
steps.description: We assess your project requirements and architect a tailored system design — ensuring the optimal hardware, software, and integration approach from day one.

steps.title: Construction & Support
steps.description: We guide procurement and system build-out, then provide hands-on technical support for the deployed solution throughout your project lifecycle.

steps.title: Verification & Inspection
steps.description: Rigorous testing and evaluation to verify that every delivered system meets your project specifications, industry standards, and performance benchmarks.

about.title: 에이스텍 소개
about.description:
AceTec has been a trusted partner in embedded computing and industrial technology solutions since 1994.
For over three decades, AceTec has stood at the intersection of global embedded technology and Korea's most demanding industries. What began as a specialized distributor has evolved into a full-spectrum technology partner — one that not only supplies world-class hardware and software through our own R&D center, but engineers custom solutions from the ground up.

We pioneered Korea's first desktop-type fanless industrial PC, setting an industry benchmark that still defines our approach today. Our platforms currently operate inside naval combat systems, railway interlocking networks, steel mill production lines, and defense simulation environments.

Backed by strategic partnerships with Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, RTI, OKTAL-SE, Cambridge Pixel, OneStopSystems, Pentek, and SMART Embedded Computing, we deliver proven global technology with deep local engineering expertise. Our clients — from the Agency for Defense Development to POSCO, Hyundai, and Hanwha Systems — trust us because we deliver outcomes, not just products.

contact.title: 문의하기
contact.description: Whether you need a product quote, technical consultation, or want to explore a partnership, our engineering team is ready to help.

solutionCards.title: 군수항공분야
solutionCards.subtitle: 국방급 컴퓨팅
solutionCards.description: 정밀 타격, C2, 감시, 무인 시스템을 위해 설계된 견고한 VPX/VME 보드 및 신호 처리 플랫폼 — 최악의 작전 환경에 특화.

solutionCards.title: 철도분야
solutionCards.subtitle: SIL4 안전 시스템
solutionCards.description: TÜV SÜD SIL4 인증 HIMA ControlSafe™ 플랫폼 — CBTC, 연동장치, 열차 제어에서 철도 신호 최고 수준의 안전 무결성 제공.

solutionCards.title: 자동화분야
solutionCards.subtitle: 산업급 플랫폼
solutionCards.description: 공장 자동화, 공정 제어, 반도체 제조, 품질 검사를 위한 팬리스 산업용 PC, 네트워크 어플라이언스, IoT 플랫폼.

solutionCards.title: 정보통신분야
solutionCards.subtitle: 네트워크 인프라
solutionCards.description: 방화벽, VPN, UTM, 로드밸런싱용 Intel/AMD 기반 네트워크 어플라이언스 — 데이터센터·통신 인프라용 고성능 NIC 어댑터 포함.

solutionCards.title: 모델링 & 시뮬레이션 분야
solutionCards.subtitle: OKTAL-SE 솔루션
solutionCards.description: 국방·항공우주 프로그램의 Hardware-In-the-Loop, Man-In-the-Loop, 훈련 환경을 위한 OKTAL-SE 고충실도 EO/IR/RF 센서 시뮬레이션.

solutionCards.title: 연구소
solutionCards.subtitle: AI·연구소
solutionCards.description: 임베디드 하드웨어 설계부터 소프트웨어 알고리즘까지 특수 제어 시스템의 전 과정을 연구하여 기술 내재화를 달성합니다.

solutionCards.title: 슈퍼컴퓨팅시스템분야
solutionCards.subtitle: 고성능 컴퓨팅
solutionCards.description: Big Data, UHD/FHD, 시뮬레이션 수요 증가에 따라 정부기관·대학·연구소에서 HPC 요구가 높아지고 있습니다. 고밀도 컴퓨팅 가속기가 GPU 기반 처리로 차별화된 HPC를 실현합니다.

solutionCards.title: 산업용 PC & 팬리스 시스템
solutionCards.subtitle: 산업용 컴퓨터
solutionCards.description: 24시간 365일 산업 운전을 위한 박스형, 랙마운트, 서버, 데스크톱, 벽걸이, 패널 PC — 팬리스 설계, 광온도 지원, KC/ISO 인증.

solutionCards.title: 레이더 처리 & 디스플레이
solutionCards.subtitle: Cambridge Pixel 솔루션
solutionCards.description: Cambridge Pixel의 고성능 레이더 스캔 변환, 목표 추적, 디스플레이 솔루션 — SPx Server, HPx 수집 카드, 통합 레이더 시각화 시스템.

solutionCards.title: 초고속 데이터 인터커넥트
solutionCards.subtitle: PCIe 패브릭 & 저지연 네트워킹
solutionCards.description: PCIe 기반 독자적 통신 프로토콜로 서버·GPU·스토리지 간 데이터 전송 지연을 최소화하고, 여러 노드를 하나의 단일 시스템으로 운영하는 초고속 연산 클러스터를 구축합니다.

companyDescription: Trusted for over 30 years in embedded computing, industrial PCs, and safety-critical systems — serving defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial markets.
